gt_sql: SELECT T3.year, T3.name, T3.date, T3.time FROM qualifying AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId INNER JOIN races AS T3 on T1.raceId = T3.raceId WHERE T1.driverId = ( SELECT driverId FROM drivers ORDER BY dob DESC LIMIT 1 ) ORDER BY T3.date ASC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT r.year, r.name, r.date, r.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN qualifying q ON d.driverId = q.driverId
JOIN races r ON q.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers WHERE dob IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY r.date
LIMIT 1;
question: On what year did the youngest driver had his first qualifying race? Also state the name, date and time of the race.
